title: Require Native Service oRPC Composition
forbids: a runtime namespace import from an oRPC composition vendor, or a base, service, or module missing its imported native first ownership hop
why: A few positive syntax facts keep the first native oRPC ownership hop visible without guessing at root contract/router object forms that TypeScript already checks.
remediate: Use exact named native vendor imports. Directly initialize standalone base from implementEffect(contract, ...), and keep the first imported-base, implement(contract).$context<...>(), or imported-service-branch hop visible inside the matching service or module initializer. Leave outer wrappers and router completeness to TypeScript and review.
message: Service composition must preserve its small set of direct native ownership facts.
